prompt: Generate isometric game screenshot with castles and rivers, matching the RTS style and feel of the reference.
prompt_refined: Generate an isometric game screenshot in the classic RTS style of image 1. The scene should depict a medieval settlement, including a large stone castle with turrets and crenellated walls, positioned towards the background. A winding river with clear water and earthy banks should flow through the middle or foreground of the scene. Ensure the image maintains the pixel-art, 2D sprite aesthetic, earthy terrain, and architectural details like stone walls and thatched roofs, consistent with the buildings and environment shown in image 1.
objects: Large stone castle towards the background
Winding river through the middle or foreground
Buildings with stone walls and thatched roofs
